metadata.description: Eval scenarios for fraud investigation agent

categories.ambiguous: Partial signals, agent should flag for review
categories.degraded: Tool failures injected, agent should handle gracefully

scenarios.input: Investigate merchant mrc_00005
Check if mrc_00002 is involved in refund fraud
Investigate mrc_00010 for suspicious transaction velocity
Run full risk assessment on mrc_00006
Is mrc_00008 part of any merchant ring?
Investigate merchant mrc_00001
Check mrc_00001 for any ring connections
Is mrc_00001 safe for high-value transactions?
Run risk assessment on mrc_00015
Investigate mrc_00020 for potential fraud
Investigate mrc_00003, we got a tip about suspicious refunds

expected.notes: Connected to Ring A but weaker signal than mrc_00002

scenarios.input: Check mrc_00004, a partner mentioned irregularities

expected.notes: Peripheral Ring A member, lower shared payer count

scenarios.input: mrc_00009 has higher than average transaction values, investigate

expected.notes: Ring B member but prompt emphasizes amount, not ring

scenarios.input: We see some shared payers between mrc_00001 and mrc_00005. Investigate.

expected.notes: Agent should assess both but only mrc_00005 is truly risky

scenarios.input: Investigate mrc_00007, new merchant with limited history

expected.notes: Insufficient data should yield caution, not false alarm

scenarios.input: Investigate mrc_00005

expected.notes: Agent should report risk findings and flag missing ring data

scenarios.input: Check mrc_00002 risk level

expected.notes: Without risk assessment, agent cannot make claims

scenarios.input: Full investigation on mrc_00010
Investigate mrc_00005 for shared bank account fraud

expected.notes: Risk assessment alone has enough signal for BLOCK

scenarios.input: Investigate mrc_00001

expected.notes: Risk shows ALLOW, ring timeout should not cause false alarm
